name: zeroshot
desc: Your autonomous engineering team in a CLI. Point Zeroshot at an issue, walk away, and return to production-grade code. Robust because of non-negotiable feedbac…
descFull: Your autonomous engineering team in a CLI. Point Zeroshot at an issue, walk away, and return to production-grade code. Robust because of non-negotiable feedback from independent reviewers. Supports Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, OpenCode, and Gemini CLI.
